message:
bd-1av0.1: complete node:fs shim with working async callbacks + 31 tests

Fix callback-based readFile/writeFile to use VFS instead of stubs.
Add callback versions: stat, readdir, mkdir, unlink. Update default
export with new async functions. 31 unit tests covering sync/async
ops, promises namespace, error paths, import styles, and VFS round-trips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
